title: ChacheCraft Official Modpack
description: The official modpack for the ChacheCraft server
body:
### ! IMPORTANT !
This modpack is for the public server ChacheCraft and may not have all features in singleplayer

### Key Features:
- Cobblemon is the core mod. It's Pokémon in Minecraft!
- Random Pokéballs spawn around the map, holding exciting rewards, just like in the games!
- Your Cobblemon party shares XP, staying true to the classic Pokémon experience.
- Rideable Cobblemon! Fly, swim, or travel across land with your Pokémon companions.
- Many datapack to add pokemons that are not in base Cobblemon

### Mini-Games & Economy
- Poke Hunts: Hourly server-wide challenges to catch specific Cobblemon for cash rewards.
- Pokedollars: A secondary economy earned by defeating wild Cobblemon.
- Exchange Pokedollars with special villagers for rare goods.
- Villagers also trade Emeralds for Pokedollars!
- Wild Cobblemon behavior: They may fight or run away, adding a fun challenge.

### Pokemon League (WIP) ONLY IN CHACHECRAFT SERVER
- Battle for badges in player host gyms
- Get all badges to compete in the league tournament
- Battle the elite four and the Champion!

### Custom Villages & Loot
- Cobblemon-Integrated Villages: Find villages with Poke Centers, shops, and valuable rewards.
- Custom Loot Tables: Cobblemon items are now integrated into vanilla chest loot.

### Additional Mods & Improvements
- TMs Mod: A massive TM library (some are placeholders without crafting recipes, for now).
- Tom’s Simple Storage Mod: A fantastic mod for getting your storage organized.
- Furniture Mod: Adds a variety of decor for cozy interiors.
- Quality of Life Mods: Improvements for visuals, sounds, crosshair, chatbox, and more.
- Voice Chat Mod: Proximity chat is enabled for better in-game interaction!
